Why Us Why Choose Sukhmani Hospital? At Sukhmani Hospital, we believe that true quality in healthcare is measured by the experiences of our patients and their families. appointment appointment Patient-Centred Your preferences, needs, and values guide every clinical decision we make. 01 Timeliness We are dedicated to reducing wait times and minimizing delays for both those receiving and providing care, ensuring that you get the timely attention you deserve. 02 Equity We provide care that is consistent in quality and accessible for all. 03 Experience At Sukhmani, be assured to interact with the most experienced doctors providing genuine advice 04 Our associations Patients Says What Patients Says Dr. Balbir Gandhi is the best  ENT, when I admitted due to my sinus congestion, my position is very bad and critical, but Dr. And staff give me best treatment and care for next 3 days in hospital, they find out the cause with all tests and operate my sinus issue, Today I am going to discharge from hospital but follow up for next few days .
Really appreciate for my treatment and very humble and helpful staff . Nurses are on 3rd floor in my room  take care of me 24x7 with  quick service and response
Thanks gurnam khamba Director Extraordinary!
My grandfather was received at critical stage, if it had not been for the quick wittedness of the staff, he would not have been with us today. I am grateful to the hospital and their staff for taking care of us during such painful time.
